induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, map_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
    by_cases hi : i ≤ l.length
    · have hfind : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: map (l.length + ·) L.partialSums) = 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_cons]
        rw [findIdx_eq] <;> grind
      simp only [hfind]
      simp [take_append_of_le_length hi]
    · push_neg at hi
      have hfind : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: map (l.length + ·) L.partialSums) =
          findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) L.partialSums + 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
        congr 1
        apply findIdx_congr
        intro x _
        grind
      simp only [hfind]
      rw [take_append_eq_append_take]
      rw [ih (i - l.length)]
      simp only [getElem?_cons_succ]
      congr 1
      · congr 1
        · omega
        · simp; omega
      · simp
        omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons]
    by_cases h : i ≤ l.length
    · have hfind : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) = 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
        rw [findIdx_eq] <;> grind
      simp only [hfind]
      simp [take_append, h]
    · push_neg at h
      have hfind : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) =
          (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) + 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
        congr 1
        funext x
        grind
      simp only [hfind]
      rw [take_append_of_le_length (by omega)]
      rw [ih (i - l.length)]
      simp only [getElem?_cons_succ]
      cases hj : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) - 1 with
      | zero =>
        simp [take_cons]
        congr 1
        omega
      | succ n =>
        simp only [take_cons_succ, flatten_cons, append_assoc]
        congr 1
        · congr 1
          omega
        · congr 2
          · omega
          · simp [flatten_cons]
            omega

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, map_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
    by_cases hi : i < l.length
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map (l.length + ·) L.partialSums) = 0 := by
        simp [findIdx_eq]
        constructor
        · simpa using hi
        · intro j hj
          simp at hj
          omega
      simp [this, take_append_of_le_length (le_of_lt hi)]
    · push_neg at hi
      have h1 : ¬decide (i < l.length) = true := by simp; omega
      simp only [h1, cond_false]
      have h2 : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map (l.length + ·) L.partialSums) =
          findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) L.partialSums + 1 := by
        rw [findIdx_map]
        · congr 1
          funext x
          simp
          omega
        · exact fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)
        · intro x
          simp
          omega
      rw [h2]
      simp only [add_sub_cancel_right, take_cons_succ, flatten_cons, getElem?_cons_succ]
      rw [ih (i - l.length)]
      simp only [take_append]
      congr 1
      · rw [take_append_eq_append_take]
        simp [hi]
      · have : i - l.length - (take (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) L.partialSums - 1) L).flatten.length =
            i - (l.length + (take (findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) L.partialSums - 1) L).flatten.length) := by
          omega
        rw [this]
        congr 1
        simp [flatten_cons]

  | nil => simp [partialSums]

      rw [take_append_of_le_length (by omega)]
    · push_neg at hi
      have hfind : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) =
          (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) + 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]

        · omega
        · congr; funext x; simp; omega
      simp only [hfind]
      have hj_pos : 0 < (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) + 1 := by omega
      have hsub : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) + 1 - 1 =
          (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) := by omega
      simp only [hsub]
      rw [take_append_eq_append_take]
      congr 1
      · simp [take_cons]
        split
        · rename_i h

        · rfl

            omega
